text.title: viral-optimization Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for viral-optimization as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Requiring signup to view shared content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Forcing pre-signup registration drops invitee conversion by 40-60%; a preview wall converts better than a hard gate.
